title: Make release archive gzip bytes identical across local and CI platforms
outOfScope: release.json and release-state.json digest values; those are bound only after this Work Item is archived.

sources.reason: The failing CI release step computes the source archive here.
The local archive contract must use the same deterministic byte encoding.
The release run passed source validation but failed at the archive digest equality check.

rawUserRequest: 修复发布归档在本地与 GitHub Runner 上的跨平台字节不一致问题，按完整 Work Item、PR、合并、ai-close-work-item 和默认分支同步流程完成；不得跳过计划工单。

declaredIntent.summary: Make the source-bound release archive byte-identical across local macOS and GitHub Linux execution.

riskAssessment.reason: Initial skeleton; replace with task-specific implementation and review risks.

executionDecision.reason: The failure evidence and deterministic implementation boundary are explicit.

preReviewWarnings: Confirm gzip header, timestamp, compression level, and OS marker are deterministic across macOS and Linux.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The release workflow and local archive contract use one explicit cross-platform deterministic gzip encoding.
The archive hash generated by the local contract equals release.json on the post-archive Work Item tree.
The workflow archive step is syntax-valid and retains the existing source-tree exclusion checks.
The Work Item is archived only after all required checks pass.
guidelines: Keep release archive bytes deterministic across supported runner platforms.
Keep the workflow and local contract implementation identical in behavior.

intent.problem: Release run 29978045161 failed when the GitHub Runner archive digest differed from the post-archive release.json value, despite the same source commit and Python gzip.compress implementation.
constraints: Change only the workflow archive pipeline and its local contract test.
Do not bind release metadata before the Work Item archive is complete.
Use only standard-library tooling already available in the release job.
intent.rationale: Explicit gzip stream construction avoids platform-dependent convenience behavior while preserving the existing deterministic tar input and compression settings.

scenarioCoverage.expected: Generated archive hash equals release.json and excludes mutable projections.
Generated archive hash equals release.json for the exact source tree.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized completion of the release workflow repair as part of the current plan execution.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
